mission.title: Install and Configure Argo CD Operator
mission.description: The Argo CD Operator is a Kubernetes operator designed to manage Argo CD clusters efficiently. It simplifies the deployment and management of Argo CD instances, making it ideal for GitOps workflows. Key trade-offs include the need for familiarity with Kubernetes operators and potential complexity in configuration.

steps.title: Add the Argo CD Operator Helm repository
steps.description:
This step adds the official Argo CD Operator Helm chart repository to your Helm configuration.

```bash

helm repo add argocd-operator https://argoproj.github.io/argo-helm

helm repo update

```

> This command adds the repository where the Argo CD Operator charts are hosted.
> Updates your local Helm chart repository cache.

steps.title: Install the Argo CD Operator
steps.description:
This step installs the Argo CD Operator using Helm, specifying the namespace and version.

```bash

kubectl create namespace argocd-operator

helm install argocd-operator argocd-operator/argocd-operator --namespace argocd-operator --version 0.12.0

```

> Creates a namespace for the Argo CD Operator.
> Installs the Argo CD Operator in the specified namespace.

steps.title: Create the CatalogSource for Argo CD
steps.description:
This step creates a CatalogSource resource that points to the Argo CD Operator registry.

```bash

kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
kind: CatalogSource
metadata:
  name: argocd-catalog
spec:
  sourceType: grpc
  image: quay.io/argoprojlabs/argocd-operator-registry@sha256:f0d2bb73e8b9d0561c931b2f2afc81cf28ca5711c476b02ac1887770e799ab92
  displayName: Argo CD Operators
  publisher: Argo CD Community
EOF

```

> Creates a CatalogSource for the Argo CD Operator.
commands:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
kind: CatalogSource
metadata:
  name: argocd-catalog
spec:
  sourceType: grpc
  image: quay.io/argoprojlabs/argocd-operator-registry@sha256:f0d2bb73e8b9d0561c931b2f2afc81cf28ca5711c476b02ac1887770e799ab92
  displayName: Argo CD Operators
  publisher: Argo CD Community
EOF

steps.title: Create the OperatorGroup
steps.description:
This step creates an OperatorGroup resource to manage the Argo CD Operator's scope.

```bash

kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1
kind: OperatorGroup
metadata:
  name: argocd-operator
  namespace: argocd-operator
EOF

```

> Defines the scope of the operator.
commands:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1
kind: OperatorGroup
metadata:
  name: argocd-operator
  namespace: argocd-operator
EOF

steps.title: Create the Subscription for the Argo CD Operator
steps.description:
This step creates a Subscription resource to install the Argo CD Operator from the CatalogSource.

```bash

kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
kind: Subscription
metadata:
  name: argocd-operator
  namespace: argocd-operator
spec:
  channel: alpha
  name: argocd-operator
  source: argocd-catalog
  sourceNamespace: olm
EOF

```

> Subscribes to the Argo CD Operator updates.
commands:
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1
kind: Subscription
metadata:
  name: argocd-operator
  namespace: argocd-operator
spec:
  channel: alpha
  name: argocd-operator
  source: argocd-catalog
  sourceNamespace: olm
EOF

steps.title: Verify the Argo CD Operator installation
steps.description:
This step checks if the Argo CD Operator is running correctly.

```bash

kubectl get pods -n argocd-operator

```

> Lists the pods in the argocd-operator namespace to verify the installation.

uninstall.title: Uninstall the Argo CD Operator
uninstall.description:
This step removes the Argo CD Operator and all associated resources. Be cautious as this may lead to data loss if not backed up.

```bash

helm uninstall argocd-operator --namespace argocd-operator

kubectl delete namespace argocd-operator

```

> Uninstalls the Argo CD Operator.
> Deletes the namespace and all resources within it.

upgrade.title: Upgrade the Argo CD Operator
upgrade.description:
Backup existing configurations, upgrade the operator, and verify the upgrade.

```bash

kubectl get all -n argocd-operator -o yaml > argocd-backup.yaml

helm upgrade argocd-operator argocd-operator/argocd-operator --namespace argocd-operator --version 0.12.0

kubectl get pods -n argocd-operator

```

> Backs up current configurations.
> Upgrades the Argo CD Operator to the specified version.
> Verifies that the pods are running after the upgrade.
commands: kubectl get all -n argocd-operator -o yaml > argocd-backup.yaml

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'no matches for kind "CatalogSource" in version "operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1"'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The OLM (Operator Lifecycle Manager) may not be installed or running.

**Fix:**
Install OLM using 'kubectl apply -f https://github.com/operator-framework/operator-lifecycle-manager/releases/download/v0.18.0/install.sh'.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'failed to create subscription: catalog source not found'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The CatalogSource may not have been created successfully.

**Fix:**
Reapply the CatalogSource manifest and check for errors.

troubleshooting.title: Pods in argocd-operator namespace are in 'CrashLoopBackOff' state.
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The operator may be misconfigured or missing required permissions.

**Fix:**
Check the operator logs with 'kubectl logs <pod-name> -n argocd-operator' and adjust configurations.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'no matches for kind "Subscription" in version "operators.coreos.com/v1alpha1"'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** The OLM may not be installed or the API version may have changed.

**Fix:**
Ensure OLM is installed and check for the correct API version.

versionNotes.changes: Added support for multi-cluster management and enhanced RBAC configurations.
versionNotes.deprecations: Deprecated the old API version for CatalogSource.
versionNotes.migrationSteps: If upgrading from v0.11.0, update your CatalogSource and Subscription manifests to the new API versions.

resolution.summary: You should see the Argo CD Operator pod running in the 'argocd-operator' namespace with a status of 'Running'. Use 'kubectl get pods -n argocd-operator' to verify.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have a Kubernetes cluster running with the required resources.
